C/C FOR TRIAL BY JURY IN DEPT 305, PALVARADO, JUDGE; GCHUCK, CLERK; RBALIAN, CSR. PLNTF HANSON APPR BY JMOUNT, ESQ, PLNTF HAUKAAS APPR BY DYOUNG, ESQ; DEFS BOJORQUEZ APPR BY SCITANOVIC, ESQ. PROSPECTIVE JURORS SWORN AND VOIR DIRE CONDUCTED. EIGHT JURORS WERE SWORN AND IMPANELLED. RESPECTIVE COUNSEL ADDRESSED COURT AND JURY WITH OPENING STATEMENTS. JURY ADMONISHED AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO 5-16-00.

TRIAL RESUMES. ALL PARTIES PRESENT AS HERETOFORE, EXCEPT DAN MACDUFF, RELIEVED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT REST. JURY IS INSTRUCTED. RESPECTIVE COUNSEL ADDRESS COURT AND JURY WITH OPENING AND CLOSING ARGUMENTS. AT 11:15, ACCOMPANIED BY A SWORN OFFICER OF THE COURT, THE JURY RETIRED TO DELIBERATE. FOLLOWING THE NOON RECESS, THE JURY RETURNS TO DELIBERATION, JUDGE ANNE BOULIANE TEMPORARILY REPLACING JUDGE ADVARADO. PURSUANT TO NOTE FROM JURY AND AFTER DISCUSSION WITH JUDGE BOULIANE AND COUNSEL, A FORM OF SPECIAL VERDICT IS SENT TO JURY IN KENNETH HAUKAAS VS BELINDA BOJORQUEZ, ET AL. AT 2:17, WITH JUDGE ALVARADO AGAIN PRESENT, THE JURY RETURNS 2 VERDICTS FOR PLAINTIFFS, MARK HANSON TO RECEIVE $4868.00 FROM DEFENDANT ANGEL BOJORQUEZ AND KENNETH N. HAUKAAS TO RECEIVE $3397.00 FROM DEFENDANT ANGEL BOJORQUEZ. EXHIBITS ORDERED RETURNED. JURY EXCUSED.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOJORQUEZ, BELINDA 1. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF MARK HANSON AND AGAINST DEFENDANT BELINDA BOJORQUEZ IN THE AMOUNT OF $4868.00 PLUS COSTS OF $2824.02 TOTAL JUDGMENT IN THE SUM OF $7692.02 2. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF KEN HAUKAAS AGAINST BOJORQUE,BELINDA IN THE SUM OF$3397 PLUS COSTS $1117, TOTAL JUDGMET $4514.00
